criteria.name: Artwork craft & genuine detail
criteria.note: S6 rendered AK3D thermal hero resolves the chronic flat-hero weakness; supporting art (S1 drone, S8 spheres) leans simple

criteria.name: Legibility & platform fitness
criteria.note: S8 RENTED ~3.2:1 and S5 body dips into bottom safe zone

one_sentence_fix: Raise S8 RENTED token to >=4.5:1 and reconcile copy.json S5 kicker with the rendered BEFORE THE CLASS.
honest_shortfalls: S8 RENTED label ~3.2:1 (intentionally subordinate); FIXED post-score to lighter cool gray
S5 body dips into bottom safe-zone margin (minor, breather)
supporting art on S1/S8 leans simple vs the strong S6 hero
note_rubric_weights_sum_1.10: weighted formula per rubric gives 9.07 vs 8.3 threshold; normalized average ~8.25
summary: Strong honest deck, no hard fails, ships at 9.07. Honesty firewall holds (never claims autonomous AI; S6 PILOT/HUMAN tag; S7 explicit AI-vs-human ledger). Number-encoded art and Alaska specificity best-in-class. S6 rendered 3D thermal terrain resolves the flat-hero weakness.
